content_body:
Are you looking for a unique and memorable way to spend the holidays this year? Consider spending the holidays in Blue Ridge, GA! Our charming mountain town offers a variety of events and activities that will make your holiday season truly special. If you're searching for a magical experience that combines the warmth of holiday traditions with the serene beauty of nature, Blue Ridge is the place to be.

From cheering on festive parades to cozying up in a luxury cabin, North Georgia has something for everyone during the holiday season. Keep reading to discover how you can spend Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Years in the mountains!

Why Choose Blue Ridge for the Holidays?

Blue Ridge, GA is a popular destination for holiday travelers and adventure chasers, and for good reason. Our quaint mountain town offers a peaceful and picturesque setting for a holiday getaway! Though snow does not typically come until late January-February, the brisk mountain air and scenic beauty makes for an easily accessible mountain vacation! With its charming downtown area, stunning mountain views, and friendly atmosphere, Blue Ridge is the perfect place to make memories with your loved ones during the holiday season.

Holiday Events for the Whole Family

Blue Ridge is known for its festive holiday events that bring the community and visitors together. In addition to events explored below, Blue Ridge is decked out with all sorts of festive decor, and the boutique shops on Main Street are the perfect place to do your Christmas shopping! Put simply, all ages are guaranteed to have a jingle-ball in the North Georgia mountains!

Cozy Mountain Retreats

A plethora of cozy luxury cabins are found in Blue Ridge, making it the perfect destination for a holiday retreat. Imagine spending Thanksgiving or Christmas surrounded by panoramic mountain views and a crackling fire with a cup of hot cocoa in hand.

Better yet, the majority of our luxury cabins are decorated for Christmas after Thanksgiving! You can also enjoy hot tubs, game rooms, and other top-of-the-line amenities to make your holiday stay even more memorable. What could be more idyllic than Christmas in the mountains?

How to Spend Thanksgiving in Blue Ridge, GA

A time for giving thanks and spending quality time with loved ones, Thanksgiving is a special time here in Blue Ridge. Check out some ideas for how to spend this holiday in North Georgia!

Enjoy a Traditional Thanksgiving Dinner in Your Luxury Cabin

Start your Thanksgiving holiday by booking a cozy cabin nestled among the trees and mountain vistas! Our luxury cabins are equipped with all the amenities you need to create the perfect Thanksgiving atmosphere. Think spacious kitchens for preparing the feast, fireplaces for that cozy ambiance, and outdoor decks with hot tubs for relaxation. Most of our properties are stocked with items like a crockpot, turkey baster, food processor, plenty of cutlery and dishes so preparing a wholesome Thanksgiving dinner in your luxury cabin is not a chore. Enjoy time together around the kitchen island while you and your family whip up a memorable meal in your home away from home.

Fallen Timber Lodge

Blue Friday

Get ready for a fun-filled day of shopping in downtown Blue Ridge on Blue Friday! Peruse the boutique shops of Main Street and enjoy Christmas cheer as you stroll through our small town.

Attend Light Up Blue Ridge and the Blue Ridge Christmas Parade

Attending the annual parade is a great way to kick off the holiday season and get into the festive spirit, especially if you have young ones in your family! The twinkling lights and festive decorations will instantly put you in a holiday mood. Don't forget to check out the stores for unique gifts and holiday decorations! Taking place the Saturday after Thanksgiving, this event is a must-see, featuring colorful floats, marching bands, and of course, Santa Claus himself. Enjoy live entertainment throughout the afternoon with a cup of hot cocoa before watching the annual Christmas tree light up at 7pm!

How to Spend Christmas in Blue Ridge, GA

Experiencing Christmas in Blue Ridge is truly magical, with the town decked out in festive decorations and holiday events happening throughout the month. Here are some ideas for how to spend Christmas in Blue Ridge!

Ride the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway's Holiday Express

During the month of December, the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway offers a special holiday train ride! The train is decked out in Christmas lights and decorations, and Santa and Mrs. Claus make an appearance on board too! Sip on a cup of cocoa while you hear "The Night Before Christmas" and enjoy the peaceful landscapes pass you by. This is a fun and unique way to experience the beauty of the Blue Ridge Mountains during the holiday season.

Enjoy a Holiday Event

Blue Ridge is home to a variety of holiday events, and, even if you decide to visit before Christmas, there is always something to experience! Playing from November 16-December 10, catch a showing of "Scrooge" at the Blue Ridge Community Theater to support local actors and enjoy an adaption of Dickens's A Christmas Carol.

To celebrate the true meaning of Christmas, visit Mt. Moriah Baptist Church on December 1-2 from 6:30-8pm for a drive-thru live nativity! An annual tradition, this long-standing church brings together the community and visitors alike for this event.

Go Ice Skating

For a fun and festive activity, head to the Blue Ridge Ice Skating Rink, located at the Blue Ridge Farmer's Market next to the Swan Drive-In! This outdoor rink is open during the holiday season and offers a unique way to experience the winter wonderland of Blue Ridge. Whether you're a seasoned skater or a beginner, this is a fun activity for the whole family.

Catch Up On Christmas Shopping

Blue Ridge's downtown area is a hub of boutique shops and art galleries. Find unique, handcrafted gifts for your loved ones, such as local crafts, art, and holiday décor. You'll find everything from antique stores to specialty gift shops! 

Spending the holidays in Blue Ridge, GA is a unique and memorable way to celebrate the season. With its festive events, cozy mountain cabin rentals, and charming atmosphere, Blue Ridge is the perfect destination for a holiday getaway. So pack your bags, grab your loved ones, and head to Blue Ridge for a holiday experience you won't forget!
title: Holiday Magic in Blue Ridge, GA: A Guide to Festive Activities
